compatibility matrix for commit-poet
client result errors warnings notes
Claude Code compatible 0 0 reference implementation of the SKILL.md format
Codex CLI partial 0 2 adopts SKILL.md; no allowed-tools; shorter description budget
Gemini CLI partial 0 3 maps to extensions (gemini-extension.json); scripts not auto-executed
Codex CLI:
warn compat/description-truncated
description is 657 chars; Codex CLI truncates at 500 — trigger phrases past that point are lost
warn compat/allowed-tools-dropped
`allowed-tools` is not honored by Codex CLI — the skill runs without tool restrictions there
Gemini CLI:
warn compat/description-truncated
description is 657 chars; Gemini CLI truncates at 256 — trigger phrases past that point are lost
warn compat/allowed-tools-dropped
`allowed-tools` is not honored by Gemini CLI — the skill runs without tool restrictions there
warn compat/scripts-unsupported
skill bundles scripts/ but Gemini CLI does not auto-execute bundled scripts
